---
title: "Captain Charles Simeon"
---

## Captain Charles Simeon

**Dates:** (1816-29 May 1867)

### Description

army officer

### Biography

He lived in Hursley;  he married (1842) Sarah Jane Williams and they had nine children who survived to adulthood. [Simeon Bt PB]

### Letters

- Letter from May 15th 1894
- Letter from Aug 12 [1867]
- Letter from May 13th [1867]
- Letter from Easter Eve [<i>c</i>. 1853-1862]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
